name: The Back Nine Golf | Orem, UT
about: The Back Nine Golf in Orem, UT is a golf simulation venue that combines technology with a social atmosphere. The venue offers a space for golfers to play and practice year-round regardless of weather conditions. It provides a modern experience suitable for various skill levels and occasions, from casual outings to more focused practice sessions.
why_golfers_like_it: Year-round golf accessibility in a controlled environment
Social atmosphere with food and drink options
Suitable for both practice and casual play

food_and_drink.notes: Full bar service with a variety of beverages

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you can bring your own clubs, or they offer club rentals on-site for your convenience.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No outside food or drinks are allowed, as they have a full kitchen and bar available on-site.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Playing 18 holes typically takes about 1-2 hours depending on the simulator settings and number of players in your bay.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, The Back Nine Golf welcomes families and offers a kid-friendly environment with activities suitable for various ages.
